goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 15:15' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should depart from 'stevenage' and should leave on 'friday'.
Make sure you get 'price'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'curry garden'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants

The train should depart from stevenage and should leave on friday
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called curry garden
Make sure you get area and postcode
